# CarbonCut

> CarbonCut is the world's first CliMarTech (Climate Marketing Technology) platform that provides real-time carbon emissions measurement, tracking, and offsetting for digital businesses and marketing operations.

## About

- [Homepage](https://carboncut.co): CarbonCut — Get 100% aligned with your Carbon Goal. AI Carbon Expert that can SEE all events, DECIDE considering climate goals, and ACT in a bespoke manner.
- [Methodology](https://carboncut.co/methodology): Comprehensive carbon measurement methodology covering GHG Protocol, ISO 14064, and 23 marketing channel-specific CO₂e formulas.
- [Calculator](https://carboncut.co/calculator): Free carbon footprint calculator for businesses.

## Solutions

- [Internet & Digital Businesses](https://carboncut.co/internet): The easiest way to become a net-zero Internet Company — track, reduce, and report digital emissions.
- [Internet Ads](https://carboncut.co/internet/internet-ads): Track the carbon cost of every impression, click, and campaign across your advertising ecosystem.
- [Oil & Natural Gas](https://carboncut.co/oil-and-natural-gas): Carbon tracking and offsetting for the oil and natural gas industry.
- [Carbon Offset Projects](https://carboncut.co/projects): Access verified carbon credits from Verra (VCS), Gold Standard, ACR, and Climate Action Reserve.
- [Early Adopters Program](https://carboncut.co/early-adopters): Join the early adopter program for exclusive access and benefits.

## Blog

- [How to Calculate Your Carbon Footprint in Minutes](https://carboncut.co/blogs/how-to-calculate-carbon-footprint-in-minutes): A practical step-by-step guide to quickly and accurately calculate your carbon footprint using modern tools and real-time tracking solutions.
- [The Massive Carbon Cost Your Company Creates in the Hours You're Not Even Looking](https://carboncut.co/blogs/massive-carbon-cost-unseen-emissions): How unseen emissions accumulate when no one is measuring them and why real-time visibility is essential.
- [Why Real-Time Visibility Is the Missing Layer in Carbon Accounting](https://carboncut.co/blogs/real-time-visibility-missing-layer-carbon-accounting): Why real-time visibility is the missing layer in carbon accounting and how live emissions data improves accuracy.
- [Why Real-Time Carbon Tracking Will Replace Annual Carbon Reports](https://carboncut.co/blogs/real-time-carbon-tracking-replace-annual-reports): Why annual carbon reporting is obsolete and how real-time tracking provides continuous, verified climate intelligence.
- [AI's Hidden Emissions: Why Innovation Needs Carbon Intelligence](https://carboncut.co/blogs/ai-hidden-emissions-why-the-next-era-of-innovation-needs-carbon-intelligence): Exploring the environmental cost of AI and how real-time carbon tracking can make intelligent systems climate-accountable.
- [The Science Behind Real-Time Carbon Tracking](https://carboncut.co/blogs/the-science-behind-real-time-carbon-tracking): The scientific principles powering real-time carbon tracking at CarbonCut.
- [Carbon Footprint Calculator 2.0](https://carboncut.co/blogs/carbon-footprint-calculator-2-0): Why real-time data beats annual reports every single time.
- [Your Carbon Footprint Calculator Is Lying to You](https://carboncut.co/blogs/your-carbon-footprint-calculator-is-lying-to-you): Why most calculators are quietly underreporting your CO₂e.
- [Introducing CarbonCut](https://carboncut.co/blogs/introducing-carboncut-fast-accurate-authorised-real-time-marketing): Fast, accurate, authorised, real-time marketing carbon emissions and auto-offsetting.
- [CarbonCut Launches World's First CliMarTech Platform](https://carboncut.co/blogs/carboncut-launches-worlds-first-climartech-platform): Making marketing measurable and net-zero ready.

## Technical Details

- [API Documentation](https://carboncut.gitbook.io/): Technical documentation and API reference for developers.
